title: Anti-Immigrant Riots Leave Belfast on Edge: ‘Everyone Is Afraid’
summary_full: In two nights of violence in Northern Ireland after a brutal stabbing, people were targeted because of their skin color, the authorities said.
summary_public: In two nights of violence in Northern Ireland after a brutal stabbing, people were targeted because of their skin color, the authorities said.
